summary.zh: 会话列表不再出现空白占位，聊天里也能看清命令工具具体做了什么。
summary.en: Session lists no longer show empty placeholders, and command tool calls are easier to read in chat.

title.zh: 会话列表不再空白占位

summary.zh: 修复新建或切换会话时侧边栏出现空白条目的问题，列表只显示真实会话。
summary.en: Fixes blank sidebar rows when creating or switching sessions so the list only shows real conversations.

summary.zh: 聊天流里展示命令工具调用的关键参数摘要，方便跟进 Agent 正在执行什么。
summary.en: Chat now shows concise argument summaries for command tool invocations so you can follow what the agent is running.

sources.title: fix: show command tool invocation details
